reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Spec deviation confirmed: Engine API blob data should undergo KZG commitment verification before network propagation, but ReconstructBlobSidecars bypasses this via NewVerifiedRODataColumn on GetBlobsV2 path (beacon-chain/execution/engine_client.go:714). Attack requires compromised local EL, which is a conditional precondition per trust_assumptions (engine_api: in_scope_for_bug_bounty=true, but 'attacks requiring a compromised local EL may be considered conditional'). Impact: 31% of network (Prysm CL share) could propagate invalid blobs. All 3 gates passed.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Engine API blob data is semi-trusted; blobs from EL must still pass KZG commitment verification (SG-020)
